sections.notes: Opening fiction establishing the mood, historical context, and themes of judgment and conflict for the clan.

sections.notes: A continuation or flashback that ties the Assamites to early vampiric history and foundational betrayals.

sections.title: Framing Fiction – Justice
sections.notes: A segment focused on the clan’s view of justice versus vengeance, reinforcing their self-image as judges, not mere killers.

sections.title: Framing Fiction – Conflicts with the Adversary
sections.notes: Describes early or emblematic conflicts with enemies of the clan, possibly including the Tremere, Baali, or other foes.

sections.title: Framing Fiction – Peace
sections.notes: A closing note to the framing story that likely presents a temporary or uneasy peace, thematically underscoring that peace is always conditional for the Assamites.
